title: PFA fixation and Percoll prep of sediments

steps: Heat 33 mL MQ water to 60°C in a 50 mL Falcon style tube. undetermined, Milli-Q water
Transfer ~0.1 g of wet sediment, crushed carbonate, or 0.5 to 1 ml of a culture to a 2 ml centrifuge tube.
Add 0.5 of sediment to a 2 ml screw top tube,

For 200 μl of sediment slurry, add 600 μl 1M TE buffer (1M Tris-HCl, 0.1M EDTA, pH 8.0) and 100 μl 100 μM pyrophosphate to a 2 ml tube. undetermined, 1M TE buffer (1M Tris-HCl, 0.1M EDTA, pH 8.0) undetermined, 100 μM pyrophosphate
In the fume hood, add 2 g paraformaldehyde powder (MW 90.1) and a few drops of 2 N NaOH (1-4). undetermined, paraformaldehyde powder (MW 90.1)
Close and mix by gently shaking tube to dissolve. Add an additional drop of 2 N NaOH if this takes more than 5 minutes.
Add 15 ml 10X PBS to bring to yield 4% PFA in 3X PBS (best for seawater samples), or 5 ml 10X PBS to yield 4% PFA in 1X PBS (best for freshwater samples).
Cool solution to room temperature and bring the final volume to 50 mL with MQ water.
Sterilize through a 0.2 μm syringer filter, and the store in 2-5 ml aliquots at -20°.

Some precipitate will likely be observed as the aliquots thaw. Place them in a beaker of room temperature water and give 10-15 minutes, and invert tubes to fully resuspend the solution. 00:15:00, room temperature water
Centrifgue at 10000g for 2 min to pellet sample and decant the liquid. 00:02:00, Centrifugation at 10000g
If the sample was taken from a stable isotope incubation, before fixation wash three times with PBS by resuspending and centrifuging to pellet.
Fully resuspend sample in 250 μl 3X PBS. (Use an alternate PBS concentration if desired). undetermined, 3X PBS

Add 750 μl 4% PFA, invert tube to mix, and then incubate at 4°C for 1-3h. (Alternatively, resuspend sample in 500 μl 3X PBS, add 500 μl 4% PFA and incubate at 4°C overnight.) undetermined, 4% PFA 03:00:00, Incubation at 4°C
Centrifuge at 10000-16000g for 3 min to pellet. 00:03:00, Centrifugation at 10000-16000g
Decant the supernatant, and wash by fully resuspending the sediment in any volume of 3X PBS.
Centrifuge at 10000-160000g for 3 min to pellet, and decant the supernatant. 00:03:00, Centrifugatio at 10000-16000g
Resuspend in 1:1 3X PBS and 100% ethanol. Add PBS first, then add a complementary volume of ethanol and mix well.
Store samples indefinitely at -20 °C.
Bring the volume to 1 ml with 3X PBS. Invert to suspend sediment in a slurry.
Add 1 ml of 4% PFA and invert to mix well. undetermined, 4% PFA
Incubate at 4°C for 12 hours. 12:00:00, Incubation at 4°C
Centrifuge at 10000g for 2 min to pellet. 00:02:00, Centrifugation at 10000g
Decant the supernatant, and wash by fully resuspending the sediment in any volume of 3X PBS.
Centrifuge at 10000g for 3 min to pellet, and decant the supernatant. 00:03:00, Centrifugation at 10000g
Resuspend in 1:1 3X PBS and 100% ethanol. Add PBS first, then add a complementary volume of ethanol and mix well.
Store samples indefinitely at -20 °C. If a -20 °C is not available, store at 4 °C until returning to the lab.
Heat the mixture in the hybridization microwave (or heat block) at 60°C for 3 min. 00:03:00, microwave (or heat block) at 60°C
Allow the tubes to cool on ice, and then sonicate on ice for 10 sec at power setting 3 (Branson Sonifier 150 with serial#C4333 wand style probe). (1/3) 00:00:10, Sonicate on ice
Add, ~1 ml percoll (filter sterilized with a 0.2 μm syringe filter) to the bottom of the sediment slurry with a pipette or needle.

Centrifuge at maximum speed (~16,000g) for 20 min at 4°C. 00:20:00, Centrifugation at ~16,000g After 20 min, the mixture will be separated by density, with the sediment in a pellet at the bottom and two distinct liquid layers. The bottom layer is primarily percoll and the top is primarily TE/PBS/ethanol. At the interface, expect to see a brown, “fluffy” band of organic material including single cells and aggregates.
Remove the upper layer and the organic material, transferring to a new tube and leaving as much of the percoll behind as possible.
Concentrate the cell layer by centrifuging at maximum speed for 3 min. 00:03:00, Centrifugation at maximum speed
Sonicate on ice for 10 sec at power setting 3 (Branson Sonifier 150 with serial#C4333 wand style probe). (2/3) 00:00:10, Sonicate on ice
Sonicate on ice for 10 sec at power setting 3 (Branson Sonifier 150 with serial#C4333 wand style probe). (3/3) 00:00:10, Sonicate on ice
Remove the supernatant and resuspend in an appropriate volume of 1:1 3X PBS:100% Ethanol. Depending upon cell density 100-300 μl.
The mixture can now be stored at -20°C for subsequent FISH hybridization after spotting on slides or filter preparation.
creator: Kat Dawson
